rule_text: Setup: use every cell of an empty 4×4 board. Player 0 moves first; turns alternate, and each move places one stone on an empty cell. Player 0's first stone must be on the top row; Player 1's first stone must be on the left column. Every placement may have at most 1 enemy stone orthogonally adjacent to it. A player wins by completing a straight horizontal or vertical line of 4 friendly stones. If the next player has no legal placement and the previous move did not win, the previous player wins.
